issues: The draft accurately describes the main Berthiaume/Jets opinion column, but completely omits the Sockeyes-relevant content: a notes item mentions Matt Hervey (ex-Sockeyes defenceman, 1987 Centennial Cup roster) skating again after missing three games with a leg injury while playing for the Moncton Hawks, and leading the team in plus-minus stats.
The description should focus on or prominently include the Matt Hervey note, as that is the primary reason this clipping is archived (the viewer URL even includes the search term 'Matt Hervey' Jets).
The byline field is empty but a byline may be present — OCR does not clearly show one, so that is acceptable.
The headline appears correct per OCR.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Notes item in a Moncton Hawks column reports that ex-Sockeyes defenceman Matt Hervey resumed skating after missing three games with a leg injury, leading the Hawks in plus-minus statistics.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: A hockey notes column in The Times-Transcript includes an item on former Richmond Sockeyes defenceman Matt Hervey, then with the AHL's Moncton Hawks, who returned to practice on Monday after missing three games with a leg injury. Coach Rick Bowness hoped the second-year pro would be back in the lineup by the weekend. Hervey was leading the Hawks in plus-minus statistics at the time. The broader column covers Winnipeg Jets goaltender Daniel Berthiaume's repeated refusal to report to the Hawks and argues the Jets should trade him rather than tolerate his insubordination.
review.correctedHeadline: Jets show too much patience with Bandit
review.notes: The AI draft described only the main Berthiaume opinion piece and missed the Matt Hervey note entirely — which is clearly the reason this clipping was archived (the search URL targets "Matt Hervey" Jets). The description has been reoriented to lead with Hervey while still contextualizing the broader column.
